sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2025-10-09 18:09
- Distance: 5.6 km
- Moving time: 34:31
- Elapsed time: 35:10
- Elevation gain: 86 m
- Average heart rate: 156 bpm
- Max heart rate: 174 bpm
- Average watts: 196.2 W
- Average speed: 9.7 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `157.8 bpm`, ranging from `153.5` to `162.7 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `161.3 spm`, with a working range of `100.0` to `175.7 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `173.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `154.3 spm` (-18.7 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:09 /km` across `5.609 km` in `34:31` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:56 /km` and second-half pace was `6:23 /km` (+27 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `156.0 bpm` average and `174 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `153.6 bpm` in the first half and `158.2 bpm` in the second (+4.6 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `34:31` out of `35:10` elapsed (98.2%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `9` stop segments and `1.1%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `94.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `41.8 m` and `64.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `43.4 m` in the first half and `50.6 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
